message:
fix(search): tighten chunk vector store conversions and remove dead status string helper

This follow-up hardens numeric conversions and cleans dead code in chunk_vector_store.

Changes:
- Removes unused SemanticGenerationStatus::as_str helper.
- Replaces i64->u64 cast-by-hand reads for offset fields with direct typed row.get() for:
  - start_offset.segment_id / ordinal / byte_offset
  - end_offset.segment_id / ordinal / byte_offset
- Uses u64_to_i64(now.as_secs(), ...) in now_epoch_seconds() instead of
  usize intermediary conversion.

Why:
- Avoids unnecessary lossy cast patterns and keeps type boundaries explicit.
- Reduces lint risk and improves clarity for serialization/deserialization paths
  used by semantic chunk retrieval.
